aiAssistant.title: All-in-One Business vAi Assistant
aiAssistant.subtitle: Let AI be your most capable business partner
aiAssistant.description: Powered by our all-in-one business vAi assistant, making your business decisions faster, more accurate, and more efficient

main.title: All-in-One Business vAi Assistant
main.desc: Powered by our all-in-one business vAi assistant, making your business decisions faster, more accurate, and more efficient. Get professional advice anytime, anywhere, automate data analysis, and improve work efficiency. vAi Assistant understands your business needs and provides personalized solutions to help you optimize processes, reduce costs, and enhance competitiveness. Whether it's financial analysis, inventory management, customer service, or market strategy, vAi provides professional intelligent support for you.

0.title: Smart Q&A
0.desc: Ask business questions anytime, anywhere, get instant professional advice

1.title: Data Analysis
1.desc: Automatically analyze business data to discover trends and opportunities

2.title: Automated Suggestions
2.desc: Provide optimization suggestions based on business conditions to improve efficiency

3.title: Smart Reports
3.desc: Quickly generate professional reports, saving time and effort

whyVwork.title: Why 16,000+ SMEs Need
whyVwork.subtitle: It's not about having more features — it's about truly saving you time, money, and helping you make decisions

integration.title: One System, Connect Everything
integration.desc: Orders, inventory, accounting, customers, webstore, POS, F&B, logistics — all in one system. Data flows automatically, no more manual reconciliation.

ai.title: Sales Highly Integrated with AI
ai.desc: Not just a chatbot on the side. Our AI directly reads your leads, orders, and customer data to predict needs, automate outreach, and accelerate deal closures.

price.title: Same Features, One-Tenth the Price
price.desc: vWork charges a flat monthly fee with unlimited users. 5 users or 50 users, same price. Other platforms charge per user — the more people, the more expensive.

voffice.title: vOffice — Free Office Suite
voffice.desc: Built-in document, spreadsheet, and presentation editors supporting Word / Excel / PowerPoint formats. Your team can collaborate directly within vWork — no need for extra office software subscriptions.

vmarket.title: vMarket — Product Marketplace
vmarket.desc: List your products on the vMarket marketplace to reach more potential customers. The built-in shared platform gives SMEs their own sales channel at zero extra cost.

comparison.title: How Much Are You Spending Now?
comparison.subtitle: We pioneered the earn-first-pay-later model — billing starts only after your 5th order. Even after billing starts, we still save you a lot
comparison.note: * Prices based on publicly listed pricing from each product's official website, 2026/03 data.

scenarios.title: Your Daily Operations,
scenarios.subtitle: No matter your industry, you've definitely encountered these scenarios

0.painDesc: Track inventory in Excel, create orders in another system, then manually enter into accounting software. 2 hours a day just reconciling.
0.solutionDesc: Create order → inventory auto-deducted → accounting auto-posted. Zero manual work, zero errors.

1.painDesc: Foodpanda, Keeta, Deliveroo — three platforms on three iPads. Missing orders and mistakes when busy.
1.solutionDesc: Orders from all three platforms auto-imported into one dashboard. See everything at a glance, auto-accept orders.

2.painDesc: End of month reports: export data from 3 systems, merge in Excel. When the boss asks about revenue, you can only say 'give me a minute'.
2.solutionDesc: Just ask vAi: 'What was last month's revenue?' Answer in 3 seconds. AI connects all data, ask anything anytime.

3.painDesc: Scheduling shifts in Excel, manually calculating pay, overtime one by one. Pulling all-nighters every payday — and still getting complaints about errors.
3.solutionDesc: Auto scheduling, clock-in records auto-calculate pay, overtime and allowances done in one click. Export payroll instantly — zero errors, zero late nights.

0.title: F&B
0.desc: Auto-import orders from 3 major delivery platforms + POS checkout + table management + queue system + inventory deduction, all in one dashboard

1.title: Retail
1.desc: POS + webstore + real-time inventory sync + membership points + auto accounting entries, online and offline fully connected

2.title: E-commerce
2.desc: Webstore + orders + SF Express/Lalamove logistics integration + inventory + accounting, one system covers everything, save 3-4 subscriptions

3.title: Service Industry
3.desc: Service orders + customer management + appointment scheduling + staff rostering + WhatsApp notifications, complete customer history at a glance

4.title: Wholesale/Manufacturing
4.desc: Purchase orders + inventory management + orders + shipping + accounting, entire supply chain data automatically connected

5.title: SMEs
5.desc: Start free, enjoy full features. AI assistant helps with analysis, reports, and data management — like hiring an extra employee

useCases.title: Works for Any Industry
useCases.subtitle: vWork's high integration means every industry can find the right fit

tools.title: Powerful Tools
tools.subtitle: Make your business more flexible and efficient

vbuilder.title: Visual Website Builder
vbuilder.desc: Create professional websites effortlessly with drag-and-drop operations, no coding knowledge required. Rich templates and components help you quickly build websites that match your brand. Whether it's a corporate website, product showcase page, or e-commerce platform, everything can be easily achieved. Real-time preview lets you see the results instantly, making website building simple and efficient.
vbuilder.desc_short: No coding needed. Drag & drop to create professional websites with rich templates and real-time preview.

kiosk.title: Kiosk Mode POS Self-Service System
kiosk.desc: Designed for retail stores, this self-service checkout mode features a clean and intuitive interface that allows customers to complete purchases easily. Kiosk Mode hides unnecessary functions and focuses on the core checkout process, improving checkout efficiency. Supports multiple payment methods including cash, credit cards, mobile payments, and more. Perfect for unmanned stores, self-service areas, or scenarios requiring fast checkout, making your store operations more flexible and efficient.
kiosk.desc_short: Self-service checkout for retail stores. Clean interface, multiple payment methods, fast and efficient.

leadFinder.title: Auto Lead Finder
leadFinder.desc: AI-powered automatic lead generation system that intelligently searches for target customers, analyzes compatibility, and sends personalized outreach messages automatically. Set your criteria and let it run — scheduled sending, performance tracking, and new business opportunities come to you effortlessly.
leadFinder.desc_short: AI-powered lead search, smart matching, and automated personalized outreach — new business comes to you.

websiteSetupGuide.vmarketAddonDesc: Join VMarket to get discovered — showcase your company and products for free.
websiteSetupGuide.vmarketModalDesc: VMarket is V-sys's enterprise showcase platform, giving your company, products and services global exposure to reach more potential customers effortlessly.
websiteSetupGuide.vmarketBenefit4Desc: Update your info in vWork and it automatically syncs to VMarket — no duplicate maintenance needed.
websiteSetupGuide.vmarketModalFooter: Joining VMarket is completely free. You can turn off exposure anytime in settings.

websiteSettings.title: Website Settings

websiteSettings.languageHint: Set the default language for your website (defaults to CMS selected language)
websiteSettings.faviconHint: Recommended size: 1:1 ratio, at least 64x64 pixels
websiteSettings.publicChatLabel: Enable floating chat button on website (/co/...)
websiteSettings.publicChatHint: When enabled, unauthenticated visitors can chat with the tenant using an anonymous ID. Records will appear in Messages (/messages).
websiteSettings.cropperNotLoaded: Image cropper not loaded, please refresh and try again

websiteDomains.title: Custom Domain & SSL
websiteDomains.step1Hint: Enter the full www domain. If you don't have a domain yet, you can purchase one from registrars like GoDaddy or Squarespace, then come back to set it up.
websiteDomains.step2Hint: After completing the DNS setup, return to this page and proceed to the next step to check DNS.
websiteDomains.txtVerificationDesc: For security, you need to verify that you actually own this domain. Please add the following TXT record to your DNS provider:
websiteDomains.dnsDelayHint: DNS propagation typically takes 5–60 minutes (up to 24 hours in worst cases).
websiteDomains.step35Desc: For security, you need to verify that you actually own this domain. Please add the following TXT record to your DNS provider:
websiteDomains.step35Hint: After adding, please wait 5-10 minutes for DNS to take effect, then click 'Check Verification'.
websiteDomains.txtVerificationNotFound: Unable to get verification info, please try again later
websiteDomains.verificationSuccess: Verification successful! SSL is active, you can proceed to the next step.
websiteDomains.verificationFailed: Verification failed or not yet completed:
websiteDomains.verificationPartialSuccess: TXT verification completed, SSL is active. Cloudflare is processing backend settings, this may take 5-10 minutes. You may see Error 1014 during this time, which is normal.
websiteDomains.step4Desc: After DNS is correctly configured, the system will automatically sync with Cloudflare and issue an SSL certificate in the background.
websiteDomains.dnsCorrect: DNS is correctly pointed. The system will automatically sync Cloudflare SSL in the background. Please click "Refresh Status" later.
websiteDomains.dnsNotCorrect: DNS is not pointing to the correct target yet. Please follow the instructions to update.
websiteDomains.validationEmpty: Please enter a www domain first (e.g. www.example.com).
websiteDomains.validationWwwOnly: Only www domains are supported. Please enter a domain starting with www.
websiteDomains.validationNoProtocol: Please enter the domain only (without http(s)://).
websiteDomains.validationInvalid: Domain format is incorrect. Please enter the domain only (no paths or spaces).
websiteDomains.domainConnectStep1: Ensure the domain's NS records are pointed to Cloudflare (DNS managed by Cloudflare)
websiteDomains.domainConnectStep2: Enter `www.customer.com` on your platform and save
websiteDomains.domainConnectStep4: Come back and click "Check www DNS" to see OK
websiteDomains.domainConnectNote: Note: To achieve true "one-click automatic DNS", you need to submit the Domain Connect template to the official template repository and email `domain-connect@cloudflare.com` per Cloudflare documentation to get the template online. Before the template is live, automatic mode will become a "guided process".

diningSettings.title: Dining Settings
diningSettings.assignModeHint: Manual mode will pre-assign in the table management popup, allowing manual adjustment before confirmation.
diningSettings.phoneFieldHint: Hide to not display phone field.
diningSettings.menuCategoryHint: When set, the dining menu page only shows this category (leave empty for all products).
diningSettings.menuOnlyMessagePlaceholder: This page is for viewing menu only. Scan the QR code on the table to order.
diningSettings.menuOnlyMessageHint: Message shown when visiting /co/your-company/menu/. This page is for browsing menu only, no ordering.
diningSettings.printerDescription: After connecting a thermal printer, queue tickets will be automatically printed when taking a number.
diningSettings.supportedBrandsList: Epson, Gainscha, Xprinter, Deli, Sunmi, Star and other thermal printers using ESC/POS commands.
diningSettings.browserNote: Requires Chrome or Edge browser. First connection requires printer selection, remembered afterwards.
diningSettings.useChromeOrEdge: Please use Chrome or Edge browser

guideDiningFlow.title: Dining Flow Guide
guideDiningFlow.subtitle: Complete setup for your dining management system, from configuration to opening for business

step1.title: Basic Dining Settings
step1.description: Configure your restaurant's business hours, ordering flow, and plan dining areas.
step1.item1: Set business hours and ordering flow
step1.item2: Add dining areas (indoor, outdoor, private rooms, etc.)

step2.title: Create Tables
step2.description: Create tables in each area, set table numbers, seating capacity, and table types.
step2.item1: Add tables with table numbers and seating capacity

step3.title: Set Up Menu
step3.description: Create your menu items including dish names, prices, categories, and images. Set up product taxes if tax calculation is needed.

step4.title: Payment & POS Settings
step4.description: Configure accepted payment methods and set up POS checkout operations and receipt formats.
step4.item1: Set payment methods (cash, credit card, e-payment, etc.)
step4.item2: Configure POS interface and receipt format

step5.title: Start Serving Customers
step5.description: Once all settings are complete, you're ready for business! Use the POS checkout to take orders and process payments.
step5.item1: Use POS checkout for ordering and payment
step5.item2: Track table status on the table board
step5.item3: View order list and business reports

step6.title: Queue & Ticket Settings
step6.description: If you need a queue system, manage waiting customers here. You can also customize order and queue ticket formats.
step6.item1: Register waiting customers and send notifications
step6.item2: Customize order tickets and queue tickets format

guideDiningFlow.completeSetupHint: After completion, this guide will be hidden from the menu. You can re-enable it in 'Edit Menu'.

guideOrderFlow.title: Order Flow Guide
guideOrderFlow.subtitle: Complete configuration for your order management system, from customer management to order tracking

step1.title: Create Products
step1.description: Create your product catalog, set prices, stock, specifications, etc. If you need tax calculation, set up product taxes first.

step2.title: Configure Payment Methods
step2.description: Set up accepted payment methods such as cash, credit card, bank transfer, online payment, etc., so customers can choose convenient payment options.

step3.title: Create Orders
step3.description: After setting up products and payments, you can start creating orders. Select customers, add products, set payment and shipping methods.

step4.title: POS Settings
step4.description: Configure your point-of-sale system settings, including cashier setup and shortcut configuration for smoother retail sales.
step4.item2: Configure quick menu and popular products

step5.title: Printer Settings
step5.description: Set up your printers to ensure orders and receipts print correctly.
step5.item2: Set print format and font size

step6.title: Set Up Shipping
step6.description: If you need third-party logistics, configure shipping integrations to automatically get waybills and tracking status.

guideOrderFlow.completeSetupHint: After completion, this guide will be hidden from the menu. You can re-enable it in 'Edit Menu'.

vmarketSettings.title: VMarket Settings
vmarketSettings.heroTitle: Let the World See Your Business
vmarketSettings.heroDesc: VMarket is V-sys's enterprise showcase platform, giving your company, products and services global exposure to reach more potential customers effortlessly.
vmarketSettings.benefit1Desc: Showcase your business on VMarket and let potential customers around the world discover you.
vmarketSettings.benefit2Desc: Sync your product catalog to VMarket, making it easy for buyers to browse and inquire.
vmarketSettings.benefit3Desc: Connect with other businesses and unlock unlimited opportunities for collaboration.
vmarketSettings.joinHint: Once enabled, your company will appear on VMarket public pages for global users to browse.
vmarketSettings.infoFooter: Joining VMarket is completely free. You can turn off exposure at any time. Only information you have set as public will be displayed.

productSyncSettings.title: Product Sync Settings
productSyncSettings.subtitle: Configure vWork product sync with external marketplaces.
productSyncSettings.masterHint: Enable to sync products, inventory, and pricing to external marketplaces.
productSyncSettings.hktvSubtitle: Provide HKTVmall API credentials to start syncing.
productSyncSettings.hktvHint: Request HKTVmall API access before filling in credentials.
productSyncSettings.addSupportedHint: Only showing marketplaces with supported API integrations.
productSyncSettings.removeConfirm: Remove this marketplace connection? Settings will be retained.
productSyncSettings.shopeeSyncSubtitle: Leading Southeast Asian e-commerce platform supporting Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Taiwan and more.
productSyncSettings.lazadaSyncSubtitle: Alibaba-backed Southeast Asian e-commerce supporting Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Indonesia and more.
productSyncSettings.amazonSyncSubtitle: World's largest e-commerce platform using SP-API (Selling Partner API).
productSyncSettings.rakutenSyncSubtitle: Leading e-commerce platform in Japan and Taiwan using Rakuten RMS API.
productSyncSettings.shopeeConnectHint: Fill in the above information, then click this button to authorize via OAuth

documentSettings.invoiceTermsDesc: These terms will be displayed at the bottom of each invoice
documentSettings.invoiceNotesDesc: These notes will be displayed in the invoice notes section
documentSettings.shippingTermsDesc: These terms will be displayed at the bottom of each shipping note
documentSettings.shippingNotesDesc: These notes will be displayed in the shipping note notes section
documentSettings.styleDesc: These settings apply to all document types (Invoice, Quotation, Shipping Note, Contract, etc.) PDF output.
documentSettings.logoFallbackDesc: Falls back to enterprise logo from Enterprise Settings if not uploaded.

documentAutoSettings.autoGenerateOrderCommission: Auto Generate Order Commission Expense (Default: ON)
documentAutoSettings.autoGenerateOrderCommissionDesc: When enabled: Order commission expense will be automatically generated when order is saved, no manual button needed.
documentAutoSettings.autoGenerateServiceOrderCommission: Auto Generate Service Order Commission Expense (Default: ON)
documentAutoSettings.autoGenerateServiceOrderCommissionDesc: When enabled: Service order commission expense will be automatically generated when service order is saved, no manual button needed.
documentAutoSettings.autoGenerateOrderTaxes: Auto Generate Order Tax Expense (Default: ON)
documentAutoSettings.autoGenerateOrderTaxesDesc: Requires setting 'Order Default Include' in 'Product Taxes' first, and checking tax items in orders.
documentAutoSettings.autoGenerateServiceTaxes: Auto Generate Service Tax Expense (Default: ON)
documentAutoSettings.autoGenerateServiceTaxesDesc: Requires setting 'Service Order Default Include' in 'Service Taxes' first, and checking tax items in service orders.
documentAutoSettings.autoGenerateOrderPaymentDesc: When enabled: Payment record (invoice) will be automatically generated when order is saved, using order total amount and system default payment method/receiving account.
documentAutoSettings.autoGenerateServiceOrderPayment: Auto Generate Service Order Payment (Invoice) (Default: ON)
documentAutoSettings.autoGenerateServiceOrderPaymentDesc: When enabled: Payment record (invoice) will be automatically generated when service order is saved, using service order total amount and system default payment method/receiving account.
documentAutoSettings.autoGeneratePurchaseOrderExpense: Auto Generate Purchase Order Expense Record (Default: ON)
documentAutoSettings.autoGeneratePurchaseOrderExpenseDesc: When enabled: An expense record will be automatically generated when purchase order is saved, using purchase order total amount and system default expense payment method/payment account.
documentAutoSettings.autoUseLastSupplierQuotationPrice: Default PO item price to last supplier quotation (Default: ON)
documentAutoSettings.autoUseLastSupplierQuotationPriceDesc: When enabled: selecting a product in a purchase order will auto-fill the latest quotation unit price for the same supplier + product; falls back to product cost if no quotation is found.
documentAutoSettings.autoCalculateOrderShippingDesc: When enabled: /orders/new will calculate the cheapest shipping from 'Logistics Companies' based on customer default address and add it to the order.

posSettings.title: POS Settings
posSettings.depositPercentHint: If both percentage and fixed amount are set, the system will use the larger value

stripeConnect.title: Stripe Connect
stripeConnect.introDesc: Accept payments securely via Stripe Connect — no API Key management needed
stripeConnect.introStep1: Supports credit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay
stripeConnect.introStep2: No need to manage API Keys yourself
stripeConnect.introStep3: Automatic transfers to your bank account
stripeConnect.introStep4: View transaction records in Stripe Express Dashboard
stripeConnect.prepId: Identity verification document (ID card or passport)
stripeConnect.prepNote: The registration process takes about 5-10 minutes and requires completing verification and agreeing to Stripe's terms on Stripe's website.
stripeConnect.instructionsSubtitle: How to enable Stripe Connect payments?
stripeConnect.step1: Click the "Start Connecting Stripe" button below
stripeConnect.step2: You'll be redirected to Stripe's website to complete the following steps:
stripeConnect.step2a: Agree to Stripe's Terms of Service
stripeConnect.step2b: Enter your bank account details (for receiving payments)
stripeConnect.step3: After completing, Stripe will redirect you back here and the status will show "Connected"
stripeConnect.step5: Go to {linkStart}Payment Methods{linkEnd} to add a "Stripe Connect" type payment method
stripeConnect.step4: Set that payment method as a "Webstore Payment Method" to use it in your webstore
stripeConnect.feeDesc: Stripe charges a transaction fee per payment (typically 2.9% + HK$2.35). The platform charges an additional 2% service fee on each transaction. For details, please refer to Stripe's {linkStart}pricing page{linkEnd}.
stripeConnect.notConnectedDesc: Connect to accept credit card payments in your webstore
stripeConnect.requirementsTitle: The following items need to be completed:
stripeConnect.allReadyDesc: Go to {linkStart}Payment Methods{linkEnd} to add a "Stripe Connect" type payment method, and set it as a webstore payment method to start accepting payments.
stripeConnect.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect Stripe Connect? After disconnecting, webstore payments using Stripe Connect will no longer work.
stripeConnect.returnSuccess: Stripe Connect setup complete! Updating status...
stripeConnect.refreshWarning: Link has expired, please click "Start Connecting Stripe" again
stripeConnect.infoBannerDesc: No need to manually enter an API Key!
stripeConnect.infoBannerSetup: Please go to the {linkStart}Stripe Connect setup page{linkEnd} to complete account connection.
stripeConnect.infoBannerDone: Once connected, save this payment method to use it in your webstore.

notificationSettings.title: Notification Settings
notificationSettings.description: Configure notification switches for each module. Settings only appear when your industry template includes the relevant module.

notificationSettings.appointmentHint: Shown when the industry template includes the service order module
notificationSettings.projectDueHint: Shown when the industry template includes the project management module

enterpriseCustom.heroSubtitle: We design enterprise-ready systems for growing teams, from process discovery and module development to integration and go-live support.
enterpriseCustom.heroPoint1: Custom business workflows and front-to-back office experience
enterpriseCustom.heroPoint2: ERP / POS / CRM / logistics API integrations
enterpriseCustom.heroPoint3: Dedicated consultant and delivery manager throughout the project
enterpriseCustom.quickPanelTitle: No fixed package before understanding your needs
enterpriseCustom.quickPanelDesc: This page has no selectable plan options. We first align goals, constraints, budget, and timeline, then propose a practical implementation path.
enterpriseCustom.featureSubtitle: Built with enterprise delivery principles: scalable, maintainable, and integration-ready.

custom.title: Custom Feature and UX Design
custom.desc: Design fields, permissions, forms, and flows around your real operations instead of rigid template limitations.

integration.title: Third-party API Integration
integration.desc: Connect with your existing ERP, CRM, POS, warehouse, or logistics systems for stable cross-team data flow.

funding.title: Funding Support Guidance
funding.desc: Provide practical planning suggestions for common funding routes based on your project context.

support.title: Dedicated Post-launch Support
support.desc: A dedicated owner follows progress, change requests, and delivery risks, then supports continuous optimization.

enterpriseCustom.processSubtitle: Milestone-based execution to keep quality, scope, and timeline under control.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.desc: Understand current workflows, pain points, KPIs, and system constraints.

solution.title: Solution Design
solution.desc: Define implementation scope, architecture, timeline, and key delivery checkpoints.

build.title: Build and Validation
build.desc: Develop and test in phases with progressive review to ensure quality and maintainability.

launch.title: Launch and Operation Support
launch.desc: Provide go-live assistance, team enablement, and ongoing optimization suggestions.

enterpriseCustom.integrationSubtitle: Design a low-risk integration path based on your current stack.

erp.title: ERP / SAP
erp.desc: Sync orders, inventory, financial data, and master records.

crm.title: CRM
crm.desc: Integrate member data, segmentation, and remarketing workflows.

pos.title: POS
pos.desc: Unify online and offline transaction and storefront operation data.

logistics.title: Logistics and Warehouse
logistics.desc: Support shipment events, proof-of-delivery feedback, and status tracking.

enterpriseCustom.finalTitle: No fixed pricing table, because every enterprise is different
enterpriseCustom.finalSubtitle: Contact us on WhatsApp first. We will align goals and constraints, then propose the most suitable custom approach.
enterpriseCustom.whatsappPrefill: I want to ask about the enterprise custom solution.

customAiAgent.heroTitle: Build a Custom AI Agent for Your Business
customAiAgent.heroSubtitle: We design, develop, and deploy custom AI Agents for enterprises — from requirements analysis and knowledge base construction to workflow design and ongoing maintenance.
customAiAgent.heroPoint1: Tailor-made AI conversation and decision logic for your business needs
customAiAgent.heroPoint2: Integrate with internal systems, CRM, ERP, and third-party APIs
customAiAgent.heroPoint3: Continuous training and optimization to meet business goals
customAiAgent.quickPanelTitle: Not a generic chatbot — your business expert
customAiAgent.quickPanelDesc: Each AI Agent is tailored to your industry knowledge, business processes, and brand voice, truly understanding your business context.
customAiAgent.featureSubtitle: From conversation design to system integration, building AI Agents that deliver real results.

dialogue.title: Intelligent Conversation Design
dialogue.desc: Design conversation flows for your business scenarios with multi-turn dialogue, intent recognition, and context memory.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base Construction
knowledge.desc: Integrate company documents, FAQs, product data, and internal knowledge into a dedicated knowledge base for accurate AI responses.

integration.title: System Integration
integration.desc: Connect with CRM, ERP, order systems, and customer service platforms so your AI Agent can answer questions and take action.

optimize.title: Continuous Optimization
optimize.desc: Continuously improve AI performance through data analysis and user feedback, with regular knowledge base and strategy updates.

customAiAgent.processSubtitle: Milestone-based execution to ensure every step is verifiable.

discovery.title: Requirements & Scenario Analysis
discovery.desc: Deep dive into your business processes, customer interaction scenarios, and pain points to define the AI Agent's role and scope.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base Construction & Training
knowledge.desc: Organize enterprise knowledge, build a structured knowledge base, and train AI models to ensure response quality.

build.title: Development, Integration & Testing
build.desc: Develop conversation flows, integrate business systems, and conduct multiple rounds of testing and quality validation.

launch.title: Deployment & Continuous Optimization
launch.desc: After launch, continuously monitor performance and optimize conversation strategies and knowledge base based on data feedback.

customAiAgent.useCaseSubtitle: AI Agents can be applied across various business scenarios to boost efficiency and customer experience.

cs.title: Smart Customer Service
cs.desc: 24/7 automated customer inquiry responses, handling common questions with complex issues routed to human agents.

sales.title: Sales Assistant
sales.desc: Automatically recommend products, answer pricing questions, and follow up with leads to improve conversion rates.

internal.title: Internal Assistant
internal.desc: Help employees look up internal policies, process guides, and knowledge base to boost productivity.

booking.title: Booking & Scheduling
booking.desc: Automatically handle bookings, rescheduling, and cancellations, syncing with calendars and notification systems.

customAiAgent.finalTitle: Every business is unique — your AI Agent should be too
customAiAgent.finalSubtitle: Contact us to discuss your needs and we will plan the most suitable AI Agent solution for you.
customAiAgent.whatsappPrefill: I want to learn about your custom AI Agent service.
